title: Foreign Affairs Committees of Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania and Türkiye meet in Tallinn
summary_full: On June 8th and 9th, the delegations of the Foreign Affairs Committees of the parliaments of Estonia, Latvia and Lithuania will meet with their counterparts from the Parliament of Türkiye in Tallinn, Estonia, to discuss the security situation and further support to Ukraine.
